# Resource Manager API, gRPC: OrganizationService

Use this API to create, list, view, update, soft-delete, and undelete organizations.

## Methods

| Method | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [GetOrganization](./get-organization.md) | Returns a single organization by its UUID. |
| [ListOrganizations](./list-organizations.md) | Returns a paginated list of organizations available to the caller. |
| [CreateOrganization](./create-organization.md) | Creates a new organization. |
| [UpdateOrganization](./update-organization.md) | Updates mutable fields of an existing organization. |
| [DeleteOrganization](./delete-organization.md) | Soft-deletes an organization. |
| [UndeleteOrganization](./undelete-organization.md) | Restores a previously soft-deleted organization. |
